---
name: Data/Seed Correction
about: Report a factual error in a Distro, Command, or Desktop Environment hint
title: '[DATA] '
labels: data
assignees: ''

---

**Which Game Mode?**
(e.g., Daily Distro, Daily Desktop Environment, Daily Command)

**What is the factual error?**
Describe exactly what the hint or data says now, and why it is factually incorrect.

**What should the correct data be?**
Provide the correct information and, if possible, paste a link to the official documentation or source that proves the correct data.
